query:
INSERT INTO domain (id, created_time, tenant_id, name, oauth2_enabled, propagate_to_edge)
             VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
             ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
                 name              = EXCLUDED.name,
                 oauth2_enabled    = EXCLUDED.oauth2_enabled,
                 propagate_to_edge = EXCLUDED.propagate_to_edge
